THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PLAINTIFFS WILLIAM B. FISHER JR. AND CARLA FISHER ARE GRANTED FINAL JUDGMENT OF PARTITION AGAINST DEFENDANT MICHAEL J. FISHER JR. AND CARLA FISHER $432,187.54 PLUS $17,486.40 FOR A TOTAL OF $449,673.94 SEE SCANNER DOCUMENT.
